description: Docker containerization, final integration, and production readiness. Create Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for the full stack, add production build scripts, ensure end-to-end integration works, and create comprehensive documentation.
steps: Create Dockerfile at project root - multi-stage build: Stage 1 builds backend (npm ci, tsc), Stage 2 builds frontend (npm ci, vite build), Stage 3 production image (Node.js alpine, copy backend dist + frontend dist, serve frontend as static files from Express, expose port 5000).
Create docker-compose.yml with service for the ERP app, volume mount for SQLite database persistence, environment variables.
Create .dockerignore to exclude node_modules, .git, dist, uploads (or mount as volume).
Update backend/src/index.ts to serve frontend static files from frontend/dist in production mode (express.static).

Create backend/prisma/seed.ts enhancement - seed comprehensive demo data: 1 admin, 3 trainers, 2 counsellors, 20 students across 4 batches, 8 modules, sample lectures/attendance/marks/fees for realistic demo.
Add npm scripts in root package.json: 'seed' to run prisma seed, 'start' for production, 'docker:build', 'docker:run'.

Create README.md at project root with: project overview, architecture diagram (text-based), tech stack, setup instructions (both local dev and Docker), API documentation summary, default credentials, folder structure explanation.
Run full integration test: build Docker image, verify it starts and responds to API requests.
Ensure all existing tests still pass after integration changes.
acceptance_criteria: Docker image builds successfully with docker build
The containerized app starts and responds to HTTP requests
Frontend is served as static files in production mode
Seed script creates realistic demo data
README.md documents the full system with setup instructions
npm run build from root succeeds
